prompt: We want to do a proactive knowledge audit across our finance team. Nobody is leaving — we just want to identify where our critical knowledge is concentrated and create a risk map. The team has 4 people: CFO (12 years), Financial Controller (6 years), AP/AR Manager (3 years), and a Junior Accountant (1 year).
assertions: Identifies this as PROACTIVE capture (no departure planned)
Scores each team member using the five-factor risk assessment
Does NOT classify the CFO as LOW RISK without verifying knowledge distribution
Recommends different capture methods based on knowledge type
Identifies specific knowledge areas for each team member
Provides a prioritised capture schedule that does NOT require capturing everything immediately
